title: albizia retusa
intro: Albizia retusa, also known as the Manila tamarind or Manzanillo, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves, bark, and fruits of the plant have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function. Albizia retusa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine and home remedies.
